name: claude-ally-health
description: A health assistant skill for medical information analysis, symptom tracking, and wellness guidance.
capabilities: Analyze and summarize medical information from provided sources
Track daily symptoms and health metrics
Provide wellness guidance based on documented patterns
Answer health-related questions based on provided information
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 4 patterns that are all false positives. The SKILL.md file contains only documentation text with no executable code. URLs on lines 4 and 22 are markdown source references, not network operations. Cryptographic warnings on lines 3 and 20 match innocent text patterns. No security risks identified.
valueStatement: This skill helps users analyze medical information and track symptoms for better health management. It provides wellness guidance based on documented health patterns.
userTitle: Track symptoms and get wellness guidance with AI
limitations: Does not provide medical diagnosis or replace professional healthcare advice
Cannot access real-time medical databases or external health APIs
Limited to information provided by the user during the session
Not suitable for medical emergencies requiring immediate attention

useCases.title: Daily Symptom Tracking
useCases.description: Track daily symptoms and medication effects for doctor visits

useCases.title: Patient Documentation
useCases.description: Document patient symptom patterns and generate summary reports

useCases.title: Family Health Monitoring
useCases.description: Monitor elderly family members health metrics and wellness trends

promptTemplates.title: Basic Symptom Log
promptTemplates.prompt: Track my symptoms today: headache (severity 6/10, started 9am), fatigue (severity 7/10, all day), nausea (severity 3/10, after lunch). Note any patterns you observe.

promptTemplates.title: Weekly Pattern Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze my symptom pattern over the past week. I have recorded: [insert week of symptoms]. Identify potential triggers, peak times, and correlations between different symptoms.

promptTemplates.title: Doctor Visit Report
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a comprehensive health report based on my tracked data for my doctor appointment tomorrow. Include: symptom frequency chart, severity trends, medication timing, and questions I should ask my healthcare provider.

promptTemplates.title: Condition Research Assistant
promptTemplates.prompt: Based on my symptoms of [list symptoms] lasting [duration] with [specific characteristics], compare against documented medical conditions and suggest discussion points for my healthcare provider. Include relevant questions about diagnosis, treatment options, and lifestyle modifications.

bestPractices: Always consult healthcare professionals for medical diagnosis and treatment
Document symptoms consistently with timestamps and severity levels
Share generated reports with your healthcare provider during appointments
antiPatterns: Relying solely on AI for medical diagnosis instead of professional consultation
Ignoring severe symptoms that require immediate emergency care
Sharing sensitive health information without understanding privacy implications

faq.question: Is this skill a substitute for professional medical advice?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides information and tracking assistance only. Always consult qualified healthcare professionals for diagnosis, treatment, and medical decisions.

faq.question: How do I track my symptoms effectively?
faq.answer: Record symptoms with timestamps, severity levels (1-10), duration, and any potential triggers like food, activities, or stress. Consistency improves pattern recognition.

faq.question: Can I export my health data?
faq.answer: You can request formatted summaries and reports that can be copied and shared with your healthcare provider. Data persists only within your conversation session.

faq.question: What information should I include when logging symptoms?
faq.answer: Include symptom name, severity level, start time, duration, associated factors, medications taken, and any activities or foods that may be relevant.

faq.question: How accurate are the wellness insights provided?
faq.answer: Insights are based on general health patterns and your provided data. They are informational only and should be verified with healthcare professionals.

faq.question: Can I use this for multiple family members?
faq.answer: Yes, but maintain separate conversation sessions for each person to keep health data organized and avoid confusion in tracking and reporting.
